sim.value: In the Play Area you find the Resistance equation, R equals rho times L over A, and a piece of wire. Sliders for resistivity, length, and area allow changes to the equation and the piece of wire. The Control Area has a button to reset the sim.

interactionHint.value: Look for resistivity, length, and area sliders to play, or read on for details about equation and wire.

resistanceEquationDescription.value: Resistance, R, is equal to resistivity, rho, times length, L, over area, A.

rhoLAndAComparablePattern.value: Size of letter R is { $rToAll } the size of the letter rho, letter L, and letter A.

lAndAComparablePattern.value: Size of letter R is { $rToRho } the size of letter rho, and { $rToLAndA } letter L and letter A.

noneComparablePattern.value: Size of letter R is { $rToRho } the size of letter rho, { $rToL } letter L, and { $rToA } letter A.

relativeSizeDescription.value:
{ $relativeSize ->
  [muchMuchSmaller] much much smaller than
  [muchSmaller] much smaller than
  [slightlySmaller] slightly smaller than
  [comparable] comparable to
  [slightlyLarger] slightly larger than
  [muchLarger] much larger than
  *[muchMuchLarger] much much larger than
}

sizeChange.value:
{ $sizeChange ->
  [grows] grows
  [shrinks] shrinks
  [growsALot] grows a lot
  *[shrinksALot] shrinks a lot
}

wireDescriptionPattern.value: Currently, { a11y_wire_lengthClause }, { a11y_wire_thicknessClause }, and { a11y_wire_impuritiesClause }. Resistance is { $resistance }.

lengthClause.value:
{ $length ->
  [extremelyShort] wire is extremely short
  [veryShort] wire is very short
  [short] wire is short
  [medium] wire is of medium length
  [long] wire is long
  [veryLong] wire is very long
  *[extremelyLong] wire is extremely long
}

thicknessClause.value:
{ $thickness ->
  [extremelyThin] wire is extremely thin
  [veryThin] wire is very thin
  [thin] wire is thin
  [medium] wire is of medium thickness
  [thick] wire is thick
  [veryThick] wire is very thick
  *[extremelyThick] wire is extremely thick
}

impuritiesClause.value:
{ $impurities ->
  [tiny] there is a tiny amount of impurities in wire
  [verySmall] there is a very small amount of impurities in wire
  [small] there is a small amount of impurities in wire
  [medium] there is a medium amount of impurities in wire
  [large] there is a large amount of impurities in wire
  [veryLarge] there is a very large amount of impurities in wire
  *[huge] there is a huge amount of impurities in wire
}

slidersDescription.value: Resistivity, Length, and Area sliders allow changes to equation and wire.

sizeChangeAlertPattern.value: As letter { $letter } { $letterChange }, letter R { $rChange }. Resistance now { $resistance }.
